LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY MARSHALL'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: GRANT AS UNOPPOSED, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT MUST BE FILED AND SERVED NOT LATER THAN JUNE 14. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. Notice Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY MARSHALL's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Grant as unopposed, first amended complaint must be filed and served not later than June 14.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Dep. Calhoun. Not reported. (302/CK)
